IconoGeoJSON =
VAR _categoria = SELECTEDVALUE('TuTabla'[Category])

VAR _svgPlant = "data:image/svg+xml;base64,"

VAR _svgWH = "data:image/svg+xml;base64,"

VAR _icono =
    SWITCH(
        TRUE(),
        _categoria = "Plant", _svgPlant,
        _categoria = "WH",    _svgWH,
        BLANK()
    )

VAR _lat = SELECTEDVALUE('TuTabla'[Latitude])
VAR _lon = SELECTEDVALUE('TuTabla'[Longitude])

RETURN
IF(
    NOT ISBLANK(_icono),
    "{""type"":""Feature"",""geometry"":{""type"":""Point"",""coordinates"":[" & _lon & "," & _lat & "]},""properties"":{""icon"":""" & _icono & """}}"
)
